monthly_cve_2026_notes.2026-04: MTD through 2026-04-19 (19 days); extrapolated full-month ~5793 (3668 * 30/19). Pacing slowed: daily rate dropped from ~203/day (day 18) to ~193/day (day 19); only +19 published in the last 24 hours. Still well below March and below conservative Glasswing trajectory.

rhel8_security.note: stack.watch dropped the /8.0 version-specific path; use parent URL (covers all RHEL versions). 2026 YTD: 99 per stack.watch as of 2026-04-18. Red Hat security data API also 404s — stack.watch is the best available source.

kev_monthly_2026_notes.2026-04: 14 entries added 2026-04-01..2026-04-16 (per CISA KEV catalog version 2026.04.16; no entries on 2026-04-17 or 2026-04-18). Prior run reported 12 — reconciliation against authoritative feed gives 14. Notables: CVE-2026-34197 (Apache ActiveMQ 2026-04-16), CVE-2026-32201 (SharePoint 0-day 2026-04-14), CVE-2026-21643 (Fortinet FortiClient EMS SQLi 2026-04-13), CVE-2026-34621 (Adobe Acrobat prototype pollution 2026-04-13), CVE-2026-1340 (Ivanti EPMM 2026-04-08), CVE-2026-35616 (Fortinet FortiClient EMS 2026-04-06), CVE-2026-3502 (TrueConf Client 2026-04-02), CVE-2026-5281 (Google Dawn 2026-04-01); plus 5 legacy re-adds on 2026-04-13/14 (CVE-2009-0238, CVE-2012-1854, CVE-2020-9715, CVE-2023-21529, CVE-2023-36424) and CVE-2025-60710 Microsoft Windows.

exploit_watch_list.description: HTTP-parsing-adjacent CVEs predicted to be actively exploited. Analyst adds entries; refresh agent checks KEV status.
exploit_watch_list.focus: HTTP-parsing attack surface only: web servers, template engines, TLS terminators, reverse proxy components, API frameworks, browser-delivered payloads
